user.description: Select the Robomow device you want to add to Home Assistant and enter the mainboard serial number.

bluetooth_confirm.description: Enter the mainboard serial number for the Robomow device you want to add to Home Assistant.

error.invalid_mainboard_serial: The mainboard serial number is invalid. Verify it and try again.
error.model_unsupported: The mower model is not supported.
error.device_not_found: The Robomow device could not be found. Move closer and try again.
error.service_not_found: The required Robomow Bluetooth service was not found on this device.
error.characteristics_not_found: The required Robomow Bluetooth characteristics were not found on this device.

abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device is not a supported Robomow mower.

unsupported_device.message: This device model is not supported

start_mowing.name: Start mowing
start_mowing.description: Start mowing with optional starting zone and duration.

starting_zone.name: Starting zone
starting_zone.description: Robomow zone to start mowing from.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Mowing duration in minutes (1-255). Default is 30 minutes.

start_time.name: Start time
start_time.description: Time to start mowing each day.

end_time.name: End time
end_time.description: Time to end mowing each day.

day_0_duration.name: Monday duration
day_0_duration.description: Mowing duration for Monday in minutes (1-255).

day_0_cycles.name: Monday cycles
day_0_cycles.description: Number of mowing cycles for Monday (1-2).

day_0_zone.name: Monday zone
day_0_zone.description: Robomow zone to mow on Monday.
